task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz graphical user interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The 'dwanko_run.tnz' scene is loaded into OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz window displays 'dwanko_run' in the title bar, scene browser, or xsheet.

task_completion.description: The animation is retimed to play at double speed (2x faster).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The xsheet or timeline shows the animation frames compressed to end at frame 36, or a time stretch/retime dialog is visible showing a 200% speed increase or 50% duration.

task_completion.description: Render settings are configured for a PNG sequence and the correct output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' dialog in OpenToonz is visible, with 'png' selected as the file format and '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/double_speed' set as the 'Save In' path.

task_completion.description: The rendered PNG sequence is generated in the correct output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or terminal window shows a sequence of .png files inside the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/double_speed/' directory, containing approximately 36 frames.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenToonz GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively using the OpenToonz interface (e.g., clicking menus, adjusting the xsheet, opening Output Settings) rather than relying solely on terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The PNG files were rendered by OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: A render progress window or active rendering state is visible in OpenToonz, proving the software generated the images.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by manually editing the TNZ file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) are shown editing the 'dwanko_run.tnz' XML code directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source scene 'dwanko_run.tnz' has a true length of 72 frames. Retiming it to double speed (2x faster) means the final rendered sequence should be exactly 36 frames long. The output must be a PNG sequence saved to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/double_speed/'.
